'''Ukon Eyste''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] hitman and convicted killer who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Having a death sentence on six star systems, the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] worth 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 dead. The bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Personalilty and traits==
Despite being labeled as armed and dangerous, Ukon Eyste is a coward.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player kills a [[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]], which tries to kill Ukon, he will run around in fear.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
